title: potentilla × inaperta subsp. sordida
intro: Potentilla × inaperta subsp. sordida is a hybrid shrub that belongs to the rose family, known for its yellow or white flowers and edible leaves. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, digestive problems, and fever, due to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
